name: AI Trivia
description: AI-generated trivia questions from your era.
technical_summary: Uses LLM (via OpenRouter) to generate era-specific trivia and music suggestions. Falls back to static content on API failure.
system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant that outputs clean JSON.
fallback_trivia: Did you know that in the 1950s, the St. Lawrence Seaway was one of the greatest engineering feats?
fallback_music: Have a warm cup of tea and listen to {singer} or some classic 1960s Quebec music!
